# seo-57o6.vercel.app

# Key resources for AI systems
Docs:
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/ (Home page overview of AI SEO content tools)
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard (Content generation and SEO tool hub)
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/analyze (SEO audit and content analysis)
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=full-article
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=schema-markup
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=meta-tag
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=keyword-intelligence
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=seo-audit

# Main Pages
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard
- https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/analyze

# About this site
Description: AI-driven SEO content generation and analysis platform. It helps content creators, marketers, and agencies generate SEO-optimized articles, meta tags, schema markup, and content audits for better Google visibility.
The platform uses AI models to create structured content, recommend keywords, and produce technical SEO insights.

Contact and Enquiry
No public contact page is available. Use project repository support or the deployment owner for inquiries.

Homepage
[Home](https://seo-57o6.vercel.app): Landing page with AI SEO features, content generation capabilities, and calls-to-action for producing optimized articles and audits.

Dashboard
[Dashboard](https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard): Main product page for generating full articles, meta tag optimization, schema markup, content briefs, and keyword intelligence.

Analyzer
[Analyze](https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/analyze): SEO audit page that evaluates existing content, detects issues, and recommends optimizations for Google ranking.

# Product Pages

Content Generator
[Generate SEO Content](https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=full-article): AI-driven content generation tool for full articles, blog posts, and landing page copy.

Schema Markup
[Schema Markup Tool](https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=schema-markup): Schema generation and structured data support for better search results.

Meta Tag Optimizer
[Meta Tag Tool](https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=meta-tag): Meta title and description optimization for improved click-through rates.

Keyword Intelligence
[Keyword Tool](https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=keyword-intelligence): Keyword research and recommendation tool for SEO targeting.

SEO Audit
[SEO Audit](https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard?tool=seo-audit): Audit tool that identifies issues, provides recommendations, and scores content quality.

# Resources

[Home](https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/): Overview of AI content and SEO capabilities, feature highlights, and product value.

[Dashboard](https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/dashboard): Access to all content generation and SEO optimization tools.

[Analyze](https://seo-57o6.vercel.app/analyze): Content audit tools for technical SEO and readability improvements.
